All 4 PENDING_REVIEW files passed first-read inspection. affiliate_funnel_posts are exceptionally well-structured with FTC compliance notes. alpha_cycle3 posts have named developers with verified revenue numbers. Outreach drafts continue to be the highest-quality output in the pipeline.
